scope: create exact payload files for phases 4 through 9 runtime surfaces
create a BPB pack for those payloads
non_goals: do not claim the whole rebuild is fully machine-ready yet
do not wire these payloads into live runtime in this mission
do not prove the full loop in this mission
success_criteria: payload files are exact and machine-usable
failure_criteria: later runtime surfaces remain implied instead of emitted
coder would still need to invent the remaining runtime artifact set
tradeoffs: artifact completeness now; live wiring and proof execution later

escalation.rule: if any later-phase payload still requires interpretation, treat as BPB failure

forbidden_carry_forward: old OIL naming in new canonical payloads
evidence_inputs: phase definitions in the A-to-Z build blueprint
risk_register: later determinism and proof-mission work still needed
salvage imports may need additional adaptation contracts
founder_decision_log: emit exact files for phases 4 through 9 now

change_control.rule: future missions may tighten fields and wire runtime, but may not revert to planning-only artifacts
